landing.title: Transforming Public Administration
landing.subtitle: An intelligent, secure orchestration platform bridging citizens with digital policies, reducing officer workload, and validating transparency.
landing.citizenDesc: Query state guidelines, upload paperwork for instant OCR reading, pre-fill applications, and verify service workflows in your native language.
landing.officerDesc: Process pending applications, verify auto-extracted documents, run semantic RAG lookups, and auto-generate official replies and letters.
landing.adminDesc: Inspect the cryptographic transaction register logging every AI intent classification, RAG database match, and backend state shift.

auth.regSuccess: Registration successful! Please sign in below.
auth.noUser: No registered user found with that username.
auth.requiredFields: Please fill in all required fields.
auth.passwordShort: Password must be at least 4 characters.
auth.usernameTaken: Username is already taken for this role.
auth.officerIdRequired: Please provide your Government Officer ID.

portal.dragDropSubtitle: Or click to select files. Supported: JPG, PNG, PDF (Max 5MB)
portal.formEmptyState: Start a conversation or select a quick template to generate the official application.
portal.flowNarrative: Real-time status of your request routing through the AI back-office orchestration engine.
portal.flowTip: Select a service chip (e.g., Renew Driving License) on the left to see this pipeline execute live!
portal.step1Desc: Recognizing user intent and service category
portal.step2Desc: Fetching guidelines from official manual index
portal.step3Desc: Compiling OCR attachments and filling fields
portal.step4Desc: Forwarding packet to officer inbox for signature
portal.step5Desc: Hashing audit trails into the admin ledger
portal.myAppsDesc: Track the processing status of your submitted digital certificate and relief requests.
portal.noAppsYet: You have not submitted any applications yet.
portal.welcomeMsg: Welcome to the Government AI Copilot Service Portal. How can I help you today?
portal.routedMsg: Your application has been routed. You can check the dashboard or request another service.
portal.offlineMsg: I can assist you with certificate applications (Birth, Death, Caste, Income), Aadhaar Updates, PAN Applications, Agri-Subsidies, Rythu Bandhu Scheme, or Driving License Renewals. Please click a quick service chip above to launch.
portal.selectWorkflowMsg: Please select a service workflow template first.
